lines.speaker: Mosol Rei
lines.text: Sorry Bwana, I cannot help you at this time. Go and talk to Trufitus at Tai Bwo Wannai, I believe he needs some help.

lines.speaker: Mosol Rei
lines.text: Greetings Bwana! We've removed the threat of Rashiliyia and though there are still some random outbreaks of undead activity we are more than able to deal with it.

lines.speaker: Mosol Rei
lines.text: You're welcome to enter the village now Bwana, shall I show you the way?
